query: SELECT id, messageType, mediaUrl, media_mime_type, media_file_name FROM messages WHERE messageType IN ('imageMessage', 'image') AND mediaUrl IS NOT NULL AND mediaUrl != '' AND mediaUrl NOT LIKE '%whatsapp.net%' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5
